Author: Kait
Name: Easy Social Media Plugin
Punchline: Open F-list and X profiles advertised in player search comments.
Description: Draws buttons beside the Adventurer Plate and Examine windows that open F-list (/c/ marker) and X (@handle) profiles found in a player's search comment. Also adds an Open F-list Profile context-menu action and the /social command for your current target. A standalone /c/, /c, or c/ marker uses the player's FFXIV name; c/<name> accepts letters, underscores, and hyphens.
